name: Pineapple Applesauce Matzo Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place the matzo farfel in a colander and pour hot water over it until soaked.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg yolks, salt, sugar, and melted margarine.
4. Add the soaked farfel, crushed pineapple, applesauce, and cinnamon to the yolk mixture.
5. In another bowl, stiffly beat the egg whites and fold into the yolk mixture.
6. Sprinkle the cinnamon and sugar evenly over the top of the kugel.
7. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until golden brown and set.
